creator: sson@freebsd.org
text: https://github.com/seanbruno/qemu-bsd-user/commit/9b1c1bb82d63266e0b0e24d455e430ae366642c3  should fix this problem and give lots of output for 'sysctl -a'.  Some of the output from 'sysctl -a' may not be correct, however, since it may need to be byte swapped itself.
